contact.title: Contact

help.title: Help
help.tocDescription: Use this index to quickly jump to the section you need.
help.heroDescription: Here you will find clear guides to activate your games and solve the most common issues. Everything is designed so you can go from start to finish without getting lost.

activation.title: Activation and key redemption
activation.introStart: After your purchase, the activation code (key) appears in the
activation.introEnd: The process is the same for all platforms: copy the key, redeem it in the corresponding store, and verify that the game appears in your library.
beforeStartItems: Keep your key ready: you can view it by tapping the eye icon in the dashboard.
Make sure you are connected to the internet on your console/PC.
Open the official store for your platform (not third-party websites).
Respect upper/lower case and copy the key text exactly.
activation.whereKeyCaption: Dashboard screenshot showing the key with the eye icon.
globalProcessItems: Find your purchase and select the game whose code you want to activate.
Reveal the key and copy it. If the key is blurred, press the eye icon.
Open the official platform store and look for the “Redeem code” option.
Paste the key and confirm. If the system asks you to verify your identity, do it.
Check that the game appears in your library and download/install it if needed.
activation.noteBody: A key can usually be redeemed only once. Once activated, the game should appear in your library. If you receive an error such as “invalid code”, “already redeemed”, or “not available”, review the FAQ section or contact support.

pc.title: PC (Steam and Epic Games)
pc.intro: On PC, the key is usually redeemed in the launcher store you use. In this guide we leave you two routes: Steam and Epic Games. Follow the one that applies.
pc.steamCaption: Steam menu where a product key is redeemed.
steamSteps: Open Steam (signed in with your account).
Look for “Games” and enter “Activate a Product on Steam”.
Paste the key exactly and confirm.
Wait for Steam to process the redemption.
Open your library, find the game and click “Install”.
pc.epicCaption: Epic Games screen where a code is redeemed.
epicSteps: Open Epic Games Launcher (signed in with your account).
Go to the store and look for “Redeem Code”.
Check your library and download/install the game.
finalCheckItems: Confirm that the purchase appears in your library (Steam/Epic).
Launch the game to verify that it has been activated correctly.
If the game does not appear, check the FAQ (for example “already redeemed” or “invalid code”).

playstation.title: PlayStation (PS5 and PS4)
playstation.intro: Redemption is done with your PlayStation account in the official store. The steps are very similar between PS5 and PS4.
consoleSteps: Sign in to your PlayStation account.
Paste or type the key and confirm.
Go to your library and download/install the content.
playstation.webTitle: If you have a web alternative
playstation.webIntro: If the redemption option does not appear, try redeeming from the official PlayStation website using the same account.
webSteps: Go to the official PlayStation redemption page.
Sign in with your user account.
Paste the key, confirm, and check your library.

xbox.title: Xbox (Xbox Series X and Xbox One)
xbox.intro: On Xbox, redemption is done from Microsoft Store with your account. Both Series X and Xbox One follow the same logic.
xbox.consoleCaption: Microsoft Store menu where a code is redeemed.
consoleSteps: Sign in to your Microsoft account on the console.
Enter or paste the key and confirm.
Check that the game appears in your library.
Download/install the game if the system asks you to.
xbox.webIntro: If you prefer to do it from a browser, use the official Microsoft redemption page. It is useful if you prefer to copy the key from your phone.
webSteps: Open the official Microsoft redemption website.
Go back to your console and sync/check your library.

switch.title: Nintendo Switch
switch.intro: On Switch, redemption is done from Nintendo eShop using your account. You can do it directly on the console.
switch.consoleCaption: Nintendo eShop menu where a code is redeemed.
consoleSteps: Make sure you have an internet connection on the console.
Sign in to your Nintendo account.
Paste or type the key and confirm.
Wait for the confirmation and check your library.
switch.webTitle: If you prefer to use a browser
switch.webIntro: Some users prefer to redeem from an official Nintendo browser page. The key and the process are equivalent: the difference is the device.
webSteps: Open the official Nintendo redemption website.
Sync on the console and check your library.

finalVerification.title: Final verification (for all platforms)
items: Check that the game appears in your platform library.
If files need to be installed, complete the download.
If the game does not appear or the system says the code is not valid, review the FAQ section or use the support contact.

contactNote.title: Still not working?
contactNote.start: Check whether the code matches your platform. If the error persists, contact support from the
contactNote.end: page and include as much detail as possible (platform, error message and key).

faq.note: If you want, you can go directly to the dashboard to view the key. Use the navigation button/menu when you enter.
faq.q1: Where can I find my activation key?
faq.a1: Your key is shown in the user panel. In the purchases/returns section, find the game you bought and look for the “Key” label. By default it may be hidden (blurred) to protect your privacy; click the eye icon to reveal it and copy it.
faq.q2: Do I have to redeem the key “once” or can I reuse it?
faq.a2: In most stores, a key can be redeemed only once. After redemption, the game is linked to your account. If you try to redeem again, the store may show messages like “already redeemed”.
faq.q3: The store says “invalid code” or “not available”. What should I do?
faq.a3: First, make sure you’re using the correct platform (PC, PlayStation, Xbox, or Switch). Second, copy the key exactly (no spaces or line breaks) and double-check uppercase/lowercase. If the error persists, try redeeming again later (servers can take time). If it still fails, check the FAQ and contact support with the store’s exact message.
faq.q4: Can I redeem the key on a different platform than the one I purchased for?
faq.a4: Usually no. Keys are typically tied to a specific platform. For example, a PlayStation key cannot be redeemed on Xbox or Nintendo Switch. Redeem on the same platform indicated in your purchase to avoid errors.
faq.q5: I redeemed the key, but the game takes time to appear in my library. Is that normal?
faq.a5: Yes. Stores can take minutes (or more) to update your library. If it doesn’t appear after some time, sign out and back in, wait a bit, and refresh your library.
faq.q6: Do I need a subscription (PS Plus, Xbox Live, etc.) to redeem?
faq.a6: Generally no. Redemption adds the game to your library. However, some online modes can require an active subscription depending on the platform and the game.
faq.q7: Can I redeem the key from mobile or a browser instead of a console?
faq.a7: It depends on the store. In general, official stores may offer web redemption options, but most of the time the process is done directly on the console. If your store allows it via a web page, always use the official site and the same account you want to use.
faq.q8: What does “already redeemed / already redeemed” mean?
faq.a8: It means the key was already redeemed previously (by another purchase or an earlier redemption). If you haven’t redeemed it, confirm you’re using the same store account and contact support with the exact platform and store message.
faq.q9: In the dashboard the key is blurred. How can I see it to copy it?
faq.a9: Click the eye icon in the dashboard to reveal the key temporarily. Then copy it and redeem it in the store. Avoid sharing the key and blur it again if the system allows it.
faq.q10: Can I view the key again after I activate it?
faq.a10: Often yes. The key usually remains available in your purchase history so you can use it for support if needed. If it’s blurred again, use the eye icon to reveal it.
faq.q11: I redeemed the key but the game doesn’t appear. How can I fix it?
faq.a11: Check that you signed in with the correct store account. Close and reopen the launcher/app, wait a moment, and refresh the library. If the game still doesn’t show up, contact support and include the store error/status.
faq.q12: What if my purchase was refunded/canceled?
faq.a12: If your purchase was refunded, the store or platform services can revoke access over time. In that case redemption may fail or the game may not appear. Contact support to review the exact order status.
faq.a13: Keys normally don’t expire, but some stores may impose limits by region or internal policy. If the store indicates expiration or says the code is invalid, verify the correct platform and contact support with the exact message.
faq.q14: How can I avoid scams and misuse of codes?
faq.a14: Never share your full key. Redeem only in the correct official store and be cautious of messages that ask for your key “to help” or that lead you to unofficial pages. If you find a suspicious link, don’t use it.
faq.q15: Can I redeem/activate on two different devices?
faq.a15: Redemption is usually tied to your account. You can redeem once and then install the game on other devices using the same store account. If you try to redeem again with the same key, it may fail.
faq.q16: When should I contact support and what information should I send?
faq.a16: Contact us if redemption fails and the verification steps don’t solve the problem. Include the platform (PC, PlayStation, Xbox, or Switch), the exact store message, and if possible a screenshot of the error. For security reasons, avoid sending the full key through unofficial channels.

cookiesPage.title: Cookie Settings
cookiesPage.intro: At GameSage we use cookies and similar technologies to provide you with a better experience, remember your preferences and analyze how you interact with our site. Below we explain what they are, what types we use and how you can manage them.
cookiesPage.section1_text: Cookies are small text files that websites save on your device (computer, mobile or tablet) when you visit them. They allow the website to remember your actions and preferences (such as login, language or font size) for a period of time, so you don't have to configure them every time you return.
cookiesPage.section2_essential_text: They are necessary for the correct functioning of the website. They allow navigation, login or shopping cart management. These cookies cannot be disabled.
cookiesPage.section2_preferences_text: They allow remembering your settings, such as language, theme or type of recommendations shown by the AI.
cookiesPage.section2_analytics_text: They help us understand how users interact with the web, detect errors and improve the general experience (for example, using analytics tools).
cookiesPage.section2_marketing_text: They allow showing relevant content and offers according to your interests, inside or outside the platform.
cookiesPage.section3_text: You can accept all cookies, reject them or configure them according to your preferences. You can also modify your browser settings to block or delete cookies. Note that if you disable essential cookies, some parts of the web may not work correctly.
cookiesPage.section3_links_intro: For more information on how to manage cookies in your browser, visit the following links:
cookiesPage.section4_text: We may update this cookie policy to reflect changes in the cookies we use or for legal, operational or regulatory reasons. We recommend you review this page regularly to stay informed about our use of cookies.
cookiesPage.section5_text: If you have questions about our cookie policy, contact us at:

privacyScreen.title: Privacy Policy
privacyScreen.intro: At GameSage, we take your privacy very seriously. This policy describes how we collect, use and protect your personal information when you use our platform.
privacyScreen.section1_intro: We collect different types of information to provide and improve our services:

section1_list.1: Profile data: Photo, game preferences, wishlist.
section1_list.2: Usage data: Browsing history, interactions with AI, games viewed.
section1_list.3: Technical data: IP address, device type, browser.
section1_list.4: Payment data: Transaction history (we do not store full card details).

section2_list.1: Personalize your experience and game recommendations.
section2_list.3: Improve our AI and search algorithms.

privacyScreen.section2_notice: We do not sell your personal data to third parties.
privacyScreen.section3_intro: We only share your information in limited situations:

section3_list.0: Service providers: Hosting, analytics, payment processing.
section3_list.1: Legal compliance: If required by law or competent authority.
section3_list.2: Rights protection: To protect the security of GameSage and its users.

privacyScreen.section3_notice: Links to external stores (Steam, Epic, etc.) are governed by their own privacy policies.

section4_list.0: We implement technical and organizational security measures.
section4_list.1: We use encryption to protect sensitive data.
section4_list.2: We limit access to personal information to authorized employees.

privacyScreen.section5_text: We use cookies to improve functionality and analyze usage. You can configure your browser to reject them, but some functions may not be available.
privacyScreen.section6_text: We keep your data while your account is active or necessary to comply with our legal obligations. You can request the deletion of your account at any time.
privacyScreen.section7_intro: You can exercise the following rights:

section7_list.3: Withdrawal of consent at any time.
section7_list.4: Lodging a complaint with the relevant data protection authority.

privacyScreen.section8_text: If you are under 14 years old, we require the consent of a responsible adult. Any detected data without proper authorization will be deleted immediately.
privacyScreen.section9_text: We may update this policy. We will indicate the date of change and, if necessary, notify all affected users.
privacyScreen.section10_text: For questions, concerns or additional requests:

conditionsScreen.title: Terms and Conditions
conditionsScreen.intro: Welcome to GameSage. By accessing or using our platform, you agree to comply with these Terms and Conditions. We recommend you read them carefully before using our services.
conditionsScreen.section1_text: GameSage is a digital platform that allows you to discover, compare and purchase video games through an intelligent recommendation system and updated prices from different official stores. Using the site implies full acceptance of the conditions described here.
conditionsScreen.section2_intro: To access certain features (such as personalized recommendations or purchase history), it may be necessary to create an account. The user agrees to:

section2_list.2: Not share the account with third parties.

conditionsScreen.section2_notice: We reserve the right to suspend or delete accounts that violate these rules or are misused.
conditionsScreen.section3_intro: The user agrees to use the platform legally and responsibly. The following are prohibited:

section3_list.0: Using the site for illegal or fraudulent purposes.
section3_list.2: Distributing or publishing offensive or unauthorized material.

conditionsScreen.section4_text: All content of GameSage (texts, logos, designs, code, etc.) is protected by copyright and intellectual property rights. The images, names and logos of video games belong to their respective owners and are used only for informational purposes. Their reproduction, distribution or commercial use without authorization is not permitted.
conditionsScreen.section5_text: Prices shown on the platform are regularly updated and include information from various official digital stores (Steam, Epic, PSN, Xbox, Nintendo, etc.). Although we strive to maintain correct and up‑to‑date information, GameSage is not responsible for possible errors or variations in prices or availability.
conditionsScreen.section6_intro: GameSage will not be responsible for:

section6_list.0: Technical failures, interruptions or data loss.
section6_list.1: Outdated or inaccurate information provided by third parties.
section6_list.2: Direct or indirect damages arising from the use of the platform or external links.

conditionsScreen.section6_notice: The user uses the service under their own responsibility.
conditionsScreen.section7_text: The collection and processing of personal data are governed by our Privacy Policy, which explains how we protect your information and your rights as a user. By registering or using the service, you confirm that you have read and accepted that policy.
conditionsScreen.section8_title: 8. Changes to the service and terms
conditionsScreen.section8_text: We may update or modify the services, features or these terms at any time. New versions will be published on this same page and will take effect at the time of their publication.
conditionsScreen.section9_text: These Terms and Conditions are governed by Spanish law. Any dispute or conflict will be resolved by the courts and tribunals of Málaga/Andalusia, unless otherwise provided by the applicable law.
conditionsScreen.section10_text: If you have questions, suggestions or issues about these Terms and Conditions, you can write to:

contactScreen.title: Contact
contactScreen.description: If you have any questions, suggestions or issues, you can contact us via email, phone, or our physical address.
